name: patient_document_capture
description: Capture a photo of a document or upload a file from the patient chart and save it as a DocumentReference. Auto-associates the patient, supports multi-page capture, and requires a document type, title, and date.

applications.name: Add Document
applications.description: Capture or upload a document and save it to the patient's chart

protocols.description: SimpleAPI endpoint that builds a PDF from captured/uploaded pages and creates a DocumentReference via the Canvas FHIR API
